message:
test(e2e): rewrite install flow spec with clipboard retry and direct navigation

Overhaul the install-flow E2E test for reliability:
- Navigate directly to /prompts/idea-wizard instead of relying on
  homepage card click flow (eliminates flaky card-locator failures)
- Add clipboard retry logic: clicks install button twice if first
  attempt yields no clipboard content, working around browser
  clipboard permission timing issues
- Collect console messages during test execution for debugging
  clipboard-related failures
- Replace dialog-scoped locator with top-level getByRole("button",
  { name: /^Install$/i }) for more robust element selection
- Add polling loop for "copied" feedback verification instead of
  a single assertion
- Rename second test to "footer shows install command" for clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
